definition: A large, heavily built plant-eating mammal with one or two horns.
example: The rhinoceros charged at the vehicle.
exampleHindi: गैंडे ने वाहन पर धावा बोल दिया।

meaning: A full, deep, prolonged cry uttered by a large wild animal.
definition: A full, deep, prolonged cry uttered by a large wild animal.
example: The lion's roar could be heard for miles.
exampleHindi: शेर की दहाड़ मीलों तक सुनी जा सकती थी।

meaning: A male domestic chicken.
definition: A male domestic chicken.
example: The rooster crowed at dawn.
exampleHindi: भोर में मुर्गे ने बाँग दी।

meaning: A small marine fish with a horse-like head and upright posture.
definition: A small marine fish with a horse-like head and upright posture.
example: The seahorse anchored itself to the seaweed.
exampleHindi: समुद्री घोड़े ने खुद को समुद्री शैवाल से बांध लिया।

meaning: A fish-eating marine mammal with a streamlined body.
definition: A fish-eating marine mammal with a streamlined body.
example: The seal balanced a ball on its nose at the aquarium.
exampleHindi: सील ने एक्वेरियम में अपनी नाक पर एक गेंद को संतुलित किया।

meaning: A long-bodied marine fish with a cartilaginous skeleton.
definition: A long-bodied marine fish with a cartilaginous skeleton.
example: The great white shark is a formidable predator.
exampleHindi: ग्रेट व्हाइट शार्क एक दुर्जेय शिकारी है।

meaning: A domesticated ruminant animal with a thick woolly coat.
definition: A domesticated ruminant animal with a thick woolly coat.
example: A flock of sheep grazed on the hillside.
exampleHindi: भेड़ों का झुंड पहाड़ी पर चर रहा था।

meaning: A small free-swimming crustacean with an elongated body.
definition: A small free-swimming crustacean with an elongated body.
example: A school of shrimp swam by the dock.
exampleHindi: झींगा का एक झुंड गोदी के पास तैर गया।

meaning: A slow-moving tropical American mammal that hangs upside down.
definition: A slow-moving tropical American mammal that hangs upside down.
example: The sloth moved deliberately through the canopy.
exampleHindi: सुस्ती जानबूझकर छतरी के पार चली गई।

meaning: An eight-legged predatory arachnid.

meaning: A short, high-pitched sound or cry, typically made by a mouse.

example: We heard a tiny squeak from the floorboards.
exampleHindi: हमने फ़्लोरबोर्ड से एक छोटी सी चीख़ सुनी।

meaning: An elongated, fast-swimming cephalopod mollusk.

example: The giant squid lives deep in the ocean.
exampleHindi: विशाल स्क्विड समुद्र की गहराई में रहता है।

meaning: A marine echinoderm with five or more radiating arms.

exampleHindi: दीमकों ने घर को काफी नुकसान पहुंचाया।
